title: MuCheck configuration
description: Schema for .mucheck.yaml — the MuCheck project-level config file.

min_msi.description: Minimum required mutation score (MSI) as a percentage. Exit code 5 if below this value.

min_covered_msi.description: Minimum required covered-code MSI as a percentage. Requires a -tix file. Exit code 5 if below.

timeout.description: Per-mutant timeout in seconds. Overridden by the --timeout CLI flag.

max_mutants.description: Maximum number of sampled mutants to evaluate. Caps the randomly sampled set.

quiet.description: Suppress output for killed and errored mutants; show only surviving mutants.

silent_mode.description: Print only the final summary line. Suppresses all per-mutant output and the breakdown table.

skip_without_test.description: When true, skip source modules that have no test annotations rather than running with zero tests.

json_output.description: Path to write a compact JSON run summary after every run. Persistent equivalent of --logger-json.

html_output.description: Path to write a standalone HTML mutation report after every run. Persistent equivalent of --logger-html.

disable_mutators.description: List of mutator names or trailing-* category wildcards to skip.

enable_mutators.description: List of mutator names or trailing-* category wildcards to restrict to.

ignore_source_lines.description: List of substrings; mutations on source lines containing any substring are suppressed.

exclude_dirs.description: List of path prefixes (relative to project root); skip mutation if the target file path starts with any listed prefix.

workers.description: Number of parallel subprocess workers (default 1). Overridden by the --workers CLI flag.
